title: Review vendor security questionnaire
description: Review the fictional vendor questionnaire and document missing answers.

title: Collect application access list
description: Collect a dummy list of active users from the sample application.

title: Confirm exception owner
description: Confirm that the fictional policy exception has an assigned owner.

title: Upload sample approval record
description: Attach a fictional approval record to the audit evidence request.

title: Document remediation actions
description: Create fictional follow-up tasks for the vendor's missing controls.

title: Review privileged accounts
description: Check dummy privileged accounts and identify unnecessary access.

title: Review sample incident timeline
description: Review a fictional incident and confirm escalation timestamps.
